description_long: This figure depicts a female-presenting adult with an athletic build, dressed in tactical attire suitable for urban or combat scenarios. She wears a cropped tank top and cargo pants with reinforced knee pads, and heavy-duty boots, suggesting readiness for physical activity. Her face is partially obscured by a tactical mask and goggles, providing protection and anonymity. Most strikingly, her arms are elongated and end in large, claw-like appendages with sharp, exaggerated fingers, giving her a menacing, non-human appearance. She also wears a headband or strap that secures her goggles and mask. The overall look combines elements of military, post-apocalyptic, and fantasy aesthetics, making her stand out in any urban environment.
description: A female-presenting adult in tactical gear with a mask, goggles, and exaggerated claw-like arms, blending military and fantasy elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tactical outfit, mask, goggles, and the full span of the large, clawed arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, the muscular build, and the dramatic extension of the clawed arm.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the cropped top, cargo pants, and the symmetrical spread of the clawed arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the headgear and the outstretched clawed arm.
attribute_clothing_type: tactical cropped tank top, cargo pants with knee pads, tactical mask, and goggles
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied back in a ponytail
